name: mediasnap-api
description: MediaSnap Video Downloader API — TikTok, Instagram, Facebook

scripts.postinstall: pip install yt-dlp --break-system-packages 2>/dev/null || pip3 install yt-dlp --break-system-packages 2>/dev/null || curl -L https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp -o /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp && chmod a+rx /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp || true
scripts.build: pip install yt-dlp --break-system-packages 2>/dev/null || pip3 install yt-dlp --break-system-packages 2>/dev/null || true

author: Md. Mainul Islam (MAINUL-X)
